name: YOKAI WATCH
description:
"Have you ever wondered about the strange everyday occurrences around you? What if I told you I knew who was responsible?"

Bonjam, my little nerds! This is my second bot on the site. I didn't see a ton of bots for this weird, endearing fandom...soooo...here I am! I also nudged Nate, Katie, and the main human characters like Eddie and Bear up. So PLS DON'T KILL ME-
